title: Mairetis microsperma
taxonomy: Mairetis microsperma is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Mairetis, which is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains this one species. Mairetis microsperma is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in dry, rocky areas. The plant has been identified as a member of the legume family, Fabaceae, which includes a wide range of plants such as beans and peas. Further classification of Mairetis microsperma can be made by looking at its subfamily, tribe, and order, but this is not specified in available information.
